title: Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
company: Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates:
Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates!
